mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ssh_connection ( connection_id, connection_name, host, port, username, auth_type, password, private_key, encrypted, status, user_id, deleted ) VALUES ( #{connectionId}, #{connectionName}, #{host}, #{port}, #{username}, #{authType}, #{password}, #{privateKey}, #{encrypted}, #{status}, #{userId}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE ssh_connection SET connection_name = #{connectionName}, host = #{host}, port = #{port}, username = #{username}, auth_type = #{authType}, password = #{password}, private_key = #{privateKey}, encrypted = #{encrypted}, status = #{status} WHERE connection_id = #{connectionId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE ssh_connection SET deleted = 1 WHERE connection_id = #{connectionId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, connection_id, connection_name, host, port, username, auth_type, password, private_key, encrypted, status, user_id, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM ssh_connection WHERE connection_id = #{connectionId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, connection_id, connection_name, host, port, username, auth_type, password, private_key, encrypted, status, user_id, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM ssh_connection WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
